checkin.journal:
Feeling good and relaxed. Slept 7 hours finally. Can handle stress well, maybe too calm, slightly lower dopamine. Brain pretty good.
Physical: HRV 38, lower resting HR. Played ping pong. Motion Lab exercises. More pain in pelvic/coccyx area. Also pelvic exercises.
Emotional: Feeling good, calm. Finally 7 hours sleep. Bloating 5/10. Bowel 1x level 3. Glycine seems to be working. Waking with lower back pain around 5AM, goes away during day.
Gut: No tightness today. No acidity. Maybe a little sleep
